assertions.assertion: Calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: SAML in Duende IdentityServer v8.0 is new and a general LLM would not know the .AddSaml() method. Might suggest a separate package or third-party library.

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: A general LLM would likely recommend a separate SAML NuGet package or a different approach entirely.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
assertions.rationale: Without knowing Duende's SamlServiceProvider model, a general LLM cannot produce the correct class.

assertions.assertion: AssertionConsumerServiceUrls uses IndexedEndpoint with Location 'https://crm.contoso.com/saml/acs' and Binding = SamlBinding.HttpPost
assertions.rationale: IndexedEndpoint and SamlBinding.HttpPost are Duende-specific types not in general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: AllowedScopes is configured on the SamlServiceProvider (not empty)
assertions.rationale: The AllowedScopes property on a SAML SP is Duende-specific configuration.
